topics.brief: Target searchers comparing high-yield savings accounts for 2026. Lead with a current ranked comparison of the highest-rate accounts (digital banks + traditional) with exact rates, then go FUTURE-LOOKING: where Philippine savings rates are heading given the BSP policy-rate cycle and inflation outlook, whether to lock funds in time deposits now vs stay liquid, and a concrete action plan for savers in 2026 and beyond. Use ₱ figures, name banks (Maya, GoTyme, SeaBank, Tonik, CIMB, Salmon), and keep it genuinely useful, not generic.
